Common.description: Chainlist is a list of EVM networks. Users can use the information to connect their wallets and Web3 middleware providers to the appropriate Chain ID and Network ID to connect to the correct chain.
Common.help-info: Helping users connect to EVM powered networks
Common.blockchain-description: This is a toy blockchain you can interact with right in the browser. Add transactions to the mempool, mine a block with a simple proof-of-work target, and watch balances update as the chain grows.
Common.blockchain-pending-description: Create transfers, then mine them into the next block.
Common.blockchain-empty-mempool: The mempool is empty. Add a transaction to start building the next block.
Common.blockchain-balances-description: A simplified ledger view derived from mined blocks and pending transfers.
